en: All right, Chuck, what the fuck is the point of your story?
ko: 좋아, 척, 네 이야기의 요점이 뭐야? 그는 도망쳤어.

en: You know, he got away. That's the point.
All right, well, question. Are you fucking serious?
I'm trying to clarify something, bro. You're embarrassing us.
ko: 뭔가 명확히 하려고 하는 거야, 형. 우리를 창피하게 하지 마.

en: It doesn't make any sense. It does make sense.
If you listen to the story, it could ask you questions. Morgan, let's see if you can get this one.
ko: 이야기를 듣고 질문을 해볼 수 있어.

en: I've got a little story for you.
All right, there's an old couple in bed, Mary and Paddy.
ko: 좋아, 침대에 있는 노부부, 메리와 패디가 있어.

en: And they wake up on the morning of their 50th anniversary.
And Mary looks over and gazes adoringly at Paddy.
She's like, oh, Jesus, Paddy, you're such a good-looking fellow.
ko: 메리: 오, 제발, 패디, 너 정말 잘생겼어.

en: I love you. I want to give you a little present.
Anything your little heart desires, I'm going to give it to you.
What would you like? Paddy's like, oh, gee, Mary, that's a very sweet offer.
Now, in 50 years, there's one thing that's been missing.
And I would like you to give me a blowjob.
ko: 그래서 나에게 구강 성교를 해줬으면 해.
